overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic urban environment in Cyberpunk 2077, walking from a wide street intersection through covered walkways and elevated ramps to an open plaza, passing by a neon-signed building with a parked motorcycle and NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking straight through the urban intersection toward the concrete overpass ahead

entered.detail: futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline
large concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
modern building with distinctive angular concrete and glass exterior
tall metal pole with traffic signals and street lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wide urban intersection under clear blue skies, with towering glass skyscrapers and a massive concrete overpass ahead. The camera moves forward along the asphalt street, passing under the shadow of the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to overgrown urban plaza

events.description: turns right from the street onto the sidewalk next to an overgrown plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning onto the sidewalk and walking past the overgrown plaza with palm trees and dry vegetation

entered.detail: neglected urban plaza with dry grass, weeds, and scattered palm trees
tropical palm trees growing in the overgrown plaza area
green metal fence railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a concrete sidewalk running alongside a building with a geometric facade. To the right lies an overgrown urban plaza with palm trees and dry vegetation, separated from the path by a green metal railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway ramp between brutalist buildings

events.description: begins ascending the inclined ramp walkway between two large concrete structures

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined concrete ramp pathway flanked by walls with graffiti

entered.detail: inclined concrete walkway leading upward between buildings
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art
silver metal railing along the left edge of the ramp
massive concrete building structure forming a covered passage ahead

segments.scene_description: The pathway transitions to an inclined concrete ramp between two massive brutalist buildings. The right wall features colorful graffiti, while the left side has a metal railing. The camera ascends toward a covered passage formed by overhead concrete structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance area with neon signage and parked motorcycle

events.description: emerges from covered walkway into semi-covered plaza with neon sign and motorcycle

agents.ego_description: approaching the neon-signed building and observing the parked motorcycle and NPCs standing nearby

notable_agents.action: standing near the construction barriers in front of the neon sign

entered.detail: large cursive neon sign reading 'bahia' in bright green mounted on the building facade
futuristic yellow and black motorcycle parked on the concrete platform
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off part of the area
large rectangular concrete planter with dried vegetation

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a semi-covered plaza dominated by a bright green neon sign reading 'bahia'. A futuristic yellow motorcycle is parked prominently in the center, while NPCs stand near construction barriers. The area feels like a small market or gathering spot.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with elevated monorail transit system

events.description: exits the bahia area into open plaza with view of elevated monorail tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the pathway toward the open plaza with elevated transit tracks visible ahead

entered.detail: elevated concrete and metal transit track structure running across the plaza
large geometric metal framework structure supporting the elevated tracks
futuristic building with a large glass dome roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bahia area behind, the camera moves into a wide open plaza bathed in sunlight. An impressive elevated monorail track dominates the view ahead, supported by massive metal frameworks. The pathway continues toward this transit hub with a futuristic glass dome building visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide urban intersection through narrow brutalist corridors and into a sun-drenched transit plaza. It begins by moving along an asphalt street under clear blue skies, passing beneath the heavy shadow of a massive concrete overpass. The camera then turns right onto a sidewalk beside a geometric building, gliding past an overgrown plaza of palm trees and dry vegetation before ascending an inclined ramp flanked by colorful graffiti and metal railings. As the camera emerges from a covered concrete passage, the scene opens into a semi-covered market area dominated by a bright green neon bahia sign and a parked yellow motorcycle. Finally, the view expands into a wide, sunlight-bathed plaza, moving toward a towering elevated monorail track and a distant futuristic glass dome.
